name: truck-workshop-backend
description: Backend monolitico JavaScript para Truck Workshop con SQL Server.

scripts.seed:from-mocks: npm run seed:generate && npm run seed
scripts.db:reset: npm run migrate && npm run seed:from-mocks
scripts.check: node scripts/check-syntax.js && node scripts/check-security.js && node scripts/audit-frontend-contract.js && node scripts/smoke-api.js
